items.title: NASA rolls out three robotic moon missions as 2029 lunar base plans take shape

items.summary: The world's oceans just experienced their hottest June on record and could set fresh highs in the months ahead as El Niño and climate change drive temperatures even higher, scientists said Wednesday.
